Found in setup_task.sh where the file is created via cat > /home/ga/Documents/RIPA_Lysis_SOP.txt.

metadata_value: Wash cells twice with cold PBS.
Add RIPA buffer (1 mL per 10cm dish).
Scrape cells and transfer to microcentrifuge tube.

Add RIPA buffer (1 mL per 10cm dish).
Scrape cells and transfer to microcentrifuge tube.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires digitizing a synthetic SOP file into SciNote. The target file is synthetically generated at /home/ga/Documents/RIPA_Lysis_SOP.txt via setup scripts and contains 6 specific steps for a RIPA Lysis Protocol. The target protocol name is explicitly checked as 'RIPA Lysis Protocol' by the export script. The verified steps correspond exactly to the lines injected into the SOP text file.
